title: trifolium montanum subsp. rupestre
intro: Trifolium montanum subsp. rupestre, also known as alpine trefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, alpine trefoil is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Alpine trefoil can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety should be further researched and confirmed.
